prestazioni: Engine swap to a 6WG1-TC 15.66L turbocharged inline-6 diesel (stock in some Giga variants) with a BorgWarner EFR 9180 turbo upgrade, custom 12mm billet fuel pump, and Bosch CRIN 3.2 high-pressure injectors for 800+ hp at 2,200 bar rail pressure
Full custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a 304-grade straight-pipe design, paired with a custom 8-inch diameter muffler from Fujitsubo for optimized backpressure and sound tuning

Ohlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers with reinforced lower mounts, custom valving for 12-ton axle loads, and remote reservoirs for heat dissipation, paired with polyamide bushings from SuperPro for chassis rigidity
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using carbon fiber overfenders from Voltex (JDM-spec), extending wheel arches by 4 inches to accommodate 24.5-inch wheels with 445/45R24 Michelin X Multi Z tires

Full Rocket Bunny-inspired aero kit for the Giga, including a carbon fiber front splitter with integrated air curtains, side skirts with vortex generators, and a dual-plane rear wing with adjustable angle of attack (up to 15 degrees)
Custom LED lighting upgrade with Osram Night Breaker Laser headlights, Hella 500 fog lights with yellow lenses, and a full underglow kit from Morimoto with RGBW control for static and dynamic modes
